name: Netdata
description: Real-time infrastructure and container monitoring — CPU, memory, disk, network, and Docker container metrics with one-second granularity.
author: Crow

install_consent_messages.en: Netdata requires read-only access to the Docker socket (/var/run/docker.sock) so it can discover and monitor every container on this host. This is a significant privilege: anything with Docker socket access can see container names, images, env vars, and resource usage. Crow enforces read-only (no writes, no container control), but review the compose file if this is sensitive on your host. Netdata also mounts /proc and /sys read-only for system metrics.
install_consent_messages.es: Netdata necesita acceso de solo lectura al socket de Docker (/var/run/docker.sock) para descubrir y monitorizar cada contenedor en este host. Es un privilegio significativo: cualquier software con acceso al socket de Docker puede ver nombres de contenedores, imágenes, variables de entorno y uso de recursos. Crow impone solo lectura (sin escrituras ni control de contenedores), pero revisa el archivo compose si esto es sensible en tu host. Netdata también monta /proc y /sys como solo lectura para métricas del sistema.

notes: Runs without SYS_PTRACE / pid:host for MVP — per-process stats are unavailable but system + container metrics work. Docker socket mounted read-only. /etc not mounted (hostname/OS shown as 'unknown' in netdata UI; acceptable trade-off).
